sections.gist: Move past complex configuration languages that slow iteration, inflate costs, and drain engineering time.
sections.fullText:
The Decagon difference

Move past complex configuration languages that slow iteration, inflate costs, and drain engineering time.

Agent Operating Procedures (AOPs) let you define agent workflows in natural language, so you can refine behavior and optimize performance as fast as your business moves.

Learn more

sections.gist: Complete, unified platform — Build, Optimize, Scale your agent
sections.fullText:
Complete, unified platform
Build your agent

Define your workflows with natural-language AOPs that deliver faster time to value, greater transparency, and trusted results at scale.

Optimize your agent

Validate and iterate on AI logic with robust testing, observability, and experimentation, so your agent stays reliable as it evolves.

Scale your agent

Unlock critical insights with an analytics suite built to surface what matters most, so you can grow smarter.

sections.gist: Decagon unifies chat, voice, and email within a single intelligence layer, ensuring customer experiences stay consistent across every channel.
sections.fullText:
Omnichannel by design
Build once.
Deploy everywhere.

Decagon unifies chat, voice, and email within a single intelligence layer, ensuring customer experiences stay consistent across every channel.

Voice

Chat

Email

Fast, intelligent voice AI agents built for natural dialog and fully customizable to your brand.
